etymology.description: 大(大) (dà, "big") + 十(十) (shí, "ten") = emphasized foundation of a large whole
etymology.interpretation: The character 夲 combines 大(大) (dà, "big") and 十(十) (shí, "ten") to symbolize the idea of something fundamentally large or foundational, metaphorically related to the concept of a 'root.'
